summary: Completed testing of PageSpeed optimizations: code splitting with React.lazy(), lazy loading on CompanyPage, Emergent badge removal, Google Fonts optimization, and Nginx gzip configuration. All features working correctly.

code_splitting: App.js uses React.lazy() for all 25+ page imports
Suspense wrapper with PageLoader fallback implemented
Navigation between pages loads chunks on demand
Multiple JS chunk files loaded (verified in browser)
lazy_loading_company_page: Suspense fallback spinners shown while loading
emergent_badge_removal: No Emergent badge visible on homepage
No Emergent badge visible on company page
No Emergent badge visible on search page
No Emergent badge visible on login page
No Emergent badge visible on CAEN page
No Emergent badge visible on Judete page
google_fonts_optimization: Google Fonts loaded via HTML link tags (not CSS @import)
preconnect hints added for fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com
Space Grotesk font rendering correctly for headings
IBM Plex Sans font rendering correctly for body text
nginx_gzip_optimization: gzip enabled for text/plain, text/css, application/json, application/javascript, etc.
Cache headers set for static assets (1y expiry, immutable)
backend_api: GET /api/company/cui/29139652 returns 200 with RADVAL COM SRL data

critical_code_review_comments: Code splitting implementation is correct with React.lazy() and Suspense
Lazy loading on CompanyPage correctly defers heavy components (Recharts, LegalInfo)
Google Fonts optimization properly uses link tags with preconnect hints
Nginx gzip configuration follows best practices
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing company data
context_for_next_testing_agent: PageSpeed optimizations verified: (1) Code splitting with React.lazy() on all 25+ pages in App.js, (2) Lazy loading on CompanyPage for FinancialChart, FinancialIndicators, LegalInfo, (3) Emergent badge removed from index.html, (4) Google Fonts moved from CSS @import to HTML link tags with preconnect, (5) Nginx gzip optimized (min_length 256, comp_level 6). All pages load correctly with proper font rendering (Space Grotesk for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body).
